fact_nuggets.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Behemoth Blade deals damage. If the target is Dynamaxed or Gigantamaxed , its damage is doubled. The bonus does not apply to Eternamax Eternatus , despite its similarities to a Gigantamaxed Pokemon. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Behemoth Blade cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] As there is no Dynamax mechanic in Generation IX, Behemoth Blade now deals damage with no secondary effect.
